summary: Budget Checker / Kiosk Lock Mode (Iteration 109) - All features tested and working. Comprehensive testing of F1 kiosk activation, product search, order list management, budget calculations, PIN-protected features (See Cost, Unlock), and localStorage persistence.

backend_api_tests.kiosk_unlock_valid_pin: PASS - POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin with action_key=kiosk_unlock accepts Manager PIN 521325
backend_api_tests.kiosk_cost_reveal_valid_pin: PASS - POST /api/auth/verify-manager-pin with action_key=kiosk_cost_reveal accepts Manager PIN 521325
backend_api_tests.kiosk_unlock_invalid_pin: PASS - Invalid PIN rejected for kiosk_unlock action
backend_api_tests.kiosk_cost_reveal_invalid_pin: PASS - Invalid PIN rejected for kiosk_cost_reveal action
backend_api_tests.product_search_detail: PASS - GET /api/products/search-detail returns products with prices, stock, SKU
backend_api_tests.product_search_with_branch: PASS - Branch-filtered search returns available stock

frontend_ui_tests.f1_activates_kiosk: PASS - Pressing F1 opens Budget Checker overlay (z-index 9999)
frontend_ui_tests.kiosk_persistence: PASS - localStorage kiosk_locked=true persists across page refresh
frontend_ui_tests.search_results: PASS - Products show name, SKU, price, stock availability
frontend_ui_tests.add_to_list: PASS - Add button (kiosk-add-{id}) adds product to order list
frontend_ui_tests.grand_total: PASS - kiosk-grand-total updates correctly (₱1,800 for 1 item, ₱3,600 for 2)
frontend_ui_tests.over_budget_display: PASS - Over budget shown in red (-₱1,700.00) when budget < total
frontend_ui_tests.clear_list: PASS - kiosk-clear-list resets order and budget
frontend_ui_tests.cost_pin_dialog: PASS - kiosk-cost-pin-dialog with input and Cancel/Reveal buttons
frontend_ui_tests.cost_invalid_pin: PASS - Invalid PIN shows error message
frontend_ui_tests.cost_valid_pin: PASS - Valid PIN reveals cost prices and shows 'Cost Visible' badge
frontend_ui_tests.unlock_dialog: PASS - kiosk-unlock-dialog with PIN input, Cancel/Unlock buttons
frontend_ui_tests.unlock_invalid_pin: PASS - Invalid PIN shows 'Invalid PIN or TOTP code' error
frontend_ui_tests.unlock_valid_pin: PASS - Manager PIN 521325 unlocks kiosk and restores full POS
frontend_ui_tests.enter_quick_add: PASS - Enter key adds first search result and clears search
frontend_ui_tests.remove_item: PASS - X button (kiosk-remove-{id}) removes item from list

verified_features: F1 key locks POS into full-screen kiosk mode (green overlay, z-9999)
Kiosk persists across page reload via localStorage 'kiosk_locked'
Product search by name works with debounced API calls
Search results show product name, SKU, retail price, stock available
Add button adds product to order list
Grand total updates in real-time when items added/removed/qty changed
Clear List button removes all items and resets budget
See Cost button opens PIN dialog
Invalid PIN shows error in cost dialog
Manager PIN (521325) unlocks kiosk and restores full POS
Invalid PIN shows error in unlock dialog
Enter key adds first search result automatically (quick add)
Remove individual items from order list (X button on hover)
Order list and budget persist to localStorage
critical_code_review_comments: BudgetChecker.jsx implements all features correctly with proper state management
PIN verification uses action_key 'kiosk_unlock' and 'kiosk_cost_reveal' as defined in verify.py PIN_POLICY_ACTIONS
localStorage keys used: kiosk_locked, kiosk_order_list, kiosk_budget for persistence
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
F1 listener in App.js correctly sets kiosk state and localStorage
Ctrl+Shift+U keyboard shortcut properly opens unlock dialog
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing products in database
context_for_next_testing_agent: Budget Checker / Kiosk Mode fully tested. Key data-testid selectors: budget-checker-screen, kiosk-search-input, kiosk-product-{id}, kiosk-add-{id}, kiosk-item-{id}, kiosk-qty-plus-{id}, kiosk-qty-minus-{id}, kiosk-remove-{id}, kiosk-grand-total, kiosk-budget-input, kiosk-remaining, kiosk-clear-list, kiosk-see-cost-btn, kiosk-cost-pin-dialog, kiosk-cost-pin-input, kiosk-cost-pin-submit, kiosk-unlock-dialog, kiosk-unlock-pin-input, kiosk-unlock-submit. PIN actions: kiosk_unlock and kiosk_cost_reveal both accept Manager PIN. localStorage keys: kiosk_locked, kiosk_order_list, kiosk_budget.
